title: twdclient
description: Advanced customizable HUD client for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric) — monitor FPS, ping, coordinates, armor, CPS, and more!
body:
🧭 TWD Client

TWD Client is an advanced Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that adds a fully customizable HUD packed with useful information and tools for players who want a clean, performance-oriented interface.


---

✨ Features

📊 Performance Info

FPS Counter – Display your frame rate in real-time

Ping & TPS – Track connection delay and server ticks

Memory Usage – Monitor system resource usage


🧍 Player Info

Coordinates (XYZ) – Always know your exact position

Speed & Combo – Measure your movement speed and hit streaks

Armor & Potions – View durability and active effects

Reach & CPS – Track hit distance and clicks per second


⚙️ Controls & Tools

Keystrokes – Show pressed keys (W, A, S, D, Space)

Crosshair Customizer – Personalize your aim reticle

Compass & Real Time – Display direction and local time


🌐 Server Info

Server IP & Player Count – Keep track of where you’re connected



---

🖱️ Usage

1. Install Fabric Loader 0.15.11+ and Fabric API 0.92.2+


2. Place the .jar file in your mods folder


3. Launch Minecraft


4. Press Right Shift to open the HUD customization menu



Drag and drop modules, right-click to toggle them, and personalize your layout however you like!


---

🧩 Requirements

Java 17+

Minecraft 1.20.1

Fabric Loader & API
